title: solori microphylla
intro: Solori microphylla, also known as Desert Lavender or Small Leaf Desert Lavender, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Solori microphylla include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
